title: StrategyDossier
description: Per-call battle plan built by CODE (routing + lever selection + anchor math) with OpenAI writing prose fields only. The ONLY source of numbers the negotiator agent may speak (honesty tool-gating, PRD §8.5).

levers.description: Ordered per the three-lever stack + ladder config; the state machine walks this list.

id.description: e.g. error_duplicate_71046, statutory_501r, benchmark_anchor, prompt_pay, lump_sum, payment_plan

armed_by.description: Which derived_flag or profile fact armed it

citation.description: Verbatim citable string (statute pack / benchmark row)

floor.description: Never offer to pay MORE than this without human approval / never settle above

notes.description: LLM-written prose briefing (no numbers that aren't in levers/citations)
